name: integration_gov_contract_the_contractor_shall_prov
method: [GOV CONTRACT] THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE FUNCTIONAL RESOURCES TO SUPPORT THE PRINTING AND GRAPHIC DESIGN SERVICES. (deadline: 2027-02-14)

phases.name: scan
steps: query SAM.gov opportunities API for NAICS 323111/323120/541430 + keywords 'printing graphic design on-site'
filter: deadline > 21 days, estimated value > $25K, status = active

phases.name: enrich
steps: extract full SOW text and deliverables
identify set-aside type (8a, WOSB, HUBZone, SDVOSB — lower competition)
pull past award history for pricing benchmarks on similar contracts

phases.name: match
steps: query existing lead database for local print shops matching geo + NAICS

phases.name: package
steps: generate capability statement draft via claude -p from SOW text
draft teaming agreement outreach email to matched subcontractors
append to outreach queue CSV for existing cold email infrastructure
